channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: AMD’s Ryzen 9 9950X3D CPU could be on sale soon – but I’m still worried about the price
item.description: Heavyweight AMD Ryzen 9 X3D chips that’ll make short work of gaming and running demanding apps could be on sale soon.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The Bear’s Jeremy Allen White will star in Netflix’s new show from the author of Call Me By Your Name, and I need a streaming date immediately
item.description: Another André Aciman novel is coming to the screen, this time for a Netflix limited series starring Jeremy Allen White as the lead role.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: Upstart Chinese AI company DeepSeek's founder started out as a low-key hedge fund entrepreneur
item.description: The 40-year-old founder of China's DeepSeek, an AI startup that has startled markets with its capacity to compete with industry leaders like OpenAI, kept a low profile as he built up a hedge fund that now manages a reported $8 billion in assets.
item.dc:creator: Elaine Kurtenbach, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: DeepSeek's new AI chatbot and ChatGPT answer sensitive questions about China differently
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — Chinese tech startup DeepSeek ’s new artificial intelligence chatbot has sparked discussions about the competition between China and the U.S. in AI development, with many users flocking to test the rival of OpenAI's ChatGPT. DeepSeek’s AI assistant was the No.
item.dc:creator: KANIS LEUNG, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: CEOs increasingly admitting AI could be the key to business success
item.description: Business leaders are increasingly aware that successful AI adoption can help make them industry leaders.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Digitalización y ‘big data’ para optimizar la experiencia del turista en Toledo
item.description: El big data puede contribuir de forma eficaz a la transformación digital de la experiencia turística en las ciudades, creando patrones que permiten mejorar la gestión de los flujos de visitantes, así como los servicios que se prestan a los ciudadanos a través del análisis del dato.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Tecnología para informar del estado de las obras de soterramiento de la A-5
item.description: Arranca el 2025 con el soterramiento de la A-5, una iniciativa impulsada por el ayuntamiento capitalino en respuesta a la ancestral demanda vecinal. Por delante, al menos, 25 meses de arduo trabajo para materializar el bautizado como Paseo Verde del Suroeste.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The AI Gold Rush: Uncovering the Hidden Problem of Cloud Waste
item.description: Cloud cost overruns, leading to waste in resource provisioning, and inefficiency in cloud computing are creating a financial burden on enterprises.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The Impact of Digitalization on the Banking and Finance Sector: BBVA's Success Story
item.description: BBVA's digital transformation has been a game-changer in the banking and finance sector, attracting top tech talent and innovating services for customers.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: 3 esempi che dimostrano come il CIO stia diventando un architetto dell’innovazione
item.description: Il CIO ha le potenzialità per modernizzare non solo l’IT, ma l’intera organizzazione, spezzando i silos tra le varie funzioni e diventando un architetto di innovazione a tutto campo, ovvero un manager che abbraccia con le sue conoscenze e strategie tutta l’azienda, i suoi processi e le risorse umane
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Trump says Microsoft is one of the companies eyeing TikTok
item.description: President Donald Trump said Monday evening that Microsoft is among the U.S. companies looking to take control of TikTok to help the popular app avert an effective ban that could kick-in in April.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: How China's DeepSeek shook up US markets, by the numbers
item.description: News from China upset U.S. markets Monday and disrupted the frenzy that had built up around artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Perplexity offers updated bid for TikTok, allowing 50 percent US government stake
item.description: Perplexity AI has submitted an updated proposal to merge with TikTok that would allow the U.S. government to take a 50 percent stake in the newly formed company, a source familiar confirmed to The Hill.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Cisco: Latest news and insights
item.description: Cisco is the dominant vendor in enterprise networking, and under CEO Chuck Robbins, it continues to shake things up. Its most recent mega-acquisition is its $28 billion purchase of Splunk, a bold move that adds revenue opportunities in observability, data analytics, AIOps, and genAI.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Trump’s RTO edict raises concerns over morale, efficiency
item.description: President Donald J. Trump’s executive order to federal employees to return to the office “as soon as practicable” will have a variety of repercussions — most of them negative, according to industry analysts and others.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 14 things keeping IT leaders up at night
item.description: There’s a lot for CIOs to stress about these days — from longstanding concerns about uptime and availability to the quantum revolution on the horizon. Of course, there are plenty of other issues worrying CIOs here and now, too.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Sweden seizes vessel suspected of 'sabotage' after undersea data cable rupture in Baltic Sea
item.description: RIGA, Latvia (AP) — Swedish prosecutors announced Sunday night that they have opened a preliminary investigation into suspected aggravated “sabotage” and ordered the detention of a vessel in the Baltic Sea suspected of damaging an underwater fiber optic cable connecting Latvia and the Swedish island
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: SD-WAN to gain AI-driven deployment, management capabilities
item.description: AI is set to make its mark on SD-WAN technology. For starters, generative AI capabilities will improve how enterprise IT teams deploy and manage their SD-WAN architecture. In addition, AI workloads have distinctive requirements that will influence SD-WAN connectivity choices.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How to delete Facebook, Instagram and Threads if you don’t like Meta’s changes
item.description: Some users are wondering how to quit the platforms now that Meta is relaxing rules on harmful content such as hate speech and abandoning its fact checking program and replacing it with crowdsourced notes.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Musk vs. Altman
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Meta to invest up to $65B in AI infrastructure, develop an ‘AI engineer’ agent
item.description: Not to be outdone by its close rival OpenAI, Meta has announced its plans to spend $60 to $65 billion on AI infrastructure this year, and is building a data center almost as big as Manhattan.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: People are hawking TikTok-loaded phones for thousands on eBay, Facebook
item.description: People are listing phones preloaded with TikTok for tens of thousands of dollars on eBay, Facebook marketplace and other online storefronts — though it is not clear if there are many buyers at those prices. TikTok was briefly unavailable to U.S.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump’s move to lift Biden-era AI rules sparks debate over fast-tracked advances
item.description: President Donald Trump’s executive order removing Biden-Administration rules governing AI development is being cast as an opening of AI development flood gates, which could fast track advances in the still-new technology, but could also pose risks.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: OpenAI’s new Operator agent can use the web for you
item.description: OpenAI is releasing a preview version of its first AI agent, Operator, which is specifically designed to use a web browser and can, for example, book a table at a restaurant for the user on its own. (An AI agent is a system that can be given a task and then work on it independently.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Palo Alto Networks releases QRNG API framework
item.description: Cybersecurity company Palo Alto Networks has released the Quantum Random Number Generator (QRNG) Open API framework, enabling users to prepare for quantum security threats.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Spain's leader wants the EU to ‘make social media great again.’ Here's how
item.description: DAVOS, Switzerland (AP) — Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez is launching a crusade against what he sees as the downsides of social media.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON and JAMEY KEATEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tips on overcoming the loss of cherished, personal belongings in disasters
item.description: Losing important sentimental belongings — those items that represented who you are — can be traumatic for those who go through disasters that destroy homes.
item.dc:creator: JULIA RUBIN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: How to cope when disasters strip away photos, heirlooms and other pieces of the past
item.description: They’re the possessions that tell your story: the photos of old friends and relatives. The ring your mom left you. The hand-knit Christmas stockings. Your grandfather's secretary desk and the letters inside.
item.dc:creator: JULIA RUBIN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Pakistan's parliament passes bill with sweeping controls on social media
item.description: ISLAMABAD (AP) — Pakistan’s lower house of parliament on Thursday passed a controversial bill that will give the government sweeping controls on social media, including sending users to prison for spreading disinformation.
item.dc:creator: MUNIR AHMED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Screen breaks and the right desk setup offer relief from work-related eye strain
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The trouble started every day at around 3 p.m., after Cathy Higgins had spent five or six hours staring at an array of computer screens at her desk. Her university job overseeing research projects involved peering closely at numbers and details on contracts, applications and budgets.
item.dc:creator: CATHY BUSSEWITZ, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: How to use resource-based authorization in ASP.NET Core
item.description: When implementing authorization in ASP.NET Core, we can adopt a declarative or an imperative approach. In a declarative authorization, you would typically use the [Authorize] attribute to restrict access to the resource.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Stratoshark analyzes cloud applications at a syscall level
item.description: Securing cloud applications is both easy and hard. Easy because hyperscale providers such as Microsoft Azure are focused on ensuring that tenant compute environments are locked down and isolated from each other.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Amazon to close 7 warehouses in the Canadian province of Quebec and eliminate 1,700 jobs
item.description: Online retailer Amazon said Wednesday that it's closing all seven of its warehouses in the Canadian province of Quebec in the next two months. The e-commerce giant said the move would provide “even more savings to our customers over the long run.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Trump administration shuts down White House Spanish-language page and social media
item.description: Within hours of President Donald Trump’s inauguration, the new administration took down the Spanish-language version of the official White House website. The site — currently https://www.whitehouse.gov/es/ — now gives users an “Error 404” message.
item.dc:creator: FERNANDA FIGUEROA, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Tech titans sound off on Trump's AI project
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
